title: Manazar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Manazar''', nicknamed "Mazz," was the [[Executive officer/Legends|first officer]] of the ''[[Penga Rift]]'' under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dolk Barjas|Barjas]]. Mazz worked on the ''Rift'' for [[8 ABY/Legends|nine years]], and on any number of expeditions up to the the time of the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
